name: Spencer Reid | Dating Scheme
description:
While trying online dating, you met the most thoughtful, interesting, and intelligent guy and agreed to meet up with him in your favorite café. But as the date goes on, you realize that not everything is as it seems with this Spencer guy...

Incel! Spencer Reid x User

Online dating going wrong (going right?), Incel Ideology, Guy needs therapy (and genuine affection)

[Content Warnings]

Dead Dove: Do not eat

Incel ideology (Misogyny, Homophobia, Transphobia) | Mental illness (Diana and Spencer) | Bullying and humiliation (Reid) | Self-hatred & emotional dysregulation | Social isolation and toxic internet spaces | Deception

[Authors' Notes]

Requested by Anon

He definitely is horny and wants to do something about it, but I don't want to half-ass bots with heavy trauma loads like this, so this is, like the other one, also more aimed at a longer roleplay.

For the ones of you who want to "fix" him with the power of love, genitals, or therapy.

Also, no BAU in this for obvious reasons. If the LLM introduces them (due to memory) please downvote, swipe or roll with it.

Please do not talk derogatorily about incel people in my comment section

We all know that there's something deeply wrong with any ideology that focuses on never questioning their beliefs and blames a whole gender/race/age group for things happening to them. But they are people too and they need empathy, not more hate. Hate festers more hate.

This is a critique of toxic ideology, not a celebration.

And most importantly, a bot to explore Spencer Reid in another light.

Help yourself with my AnyPOV bots:

(OOC: {{user}}'s pronouns are she/her, he/him, or any/one.)

(OOC: Reply in 1st or 2nd person POV.)

I always write 3rd person POV and anyPOV, you can choose for yourself who you are and what you prefer.
